LoCoMo (ByteRover), LongMemEval (Hindsight, Supermemory), LongMemEval-S (Mem0), and BEAM test different tasks on different data. Hindsight's scores come from an independently validated arXiv paper (Virginia Tech) — the 94.6% figure is from Vectorize's own homepage. Use as directional guidance only. As of April 2026.

PROVIDER PROFILES The fast version Architecture, pricing, tools exposed, and what each provider actually does well. 🧠 🔬 Mem0 Hindsight Apache 2.0 · mem0ai/mem0 · 51.4K ⭐ MIT · vectorize-io/hindsight · 2.4K ⭐ Hybrid triple-store: vector + key-value + TEMPR architecture: four parallel retrieval knowledge graph. An LLM pass extracts strategies — temporal, entity, metadata, and structured facts from conversations and stores BM25 for exact keyword matches. Strong at them across all three layers. Most widely structured technical recall: port numbers, error integrated option — first-class Python, codes, service names, deployment configs. TypeScript, and OpenAI-compatible SDKs. Three-stage pipeline: retain (ingest) → recall
